---
title: "UCL MYRIAD Targets Example"
---

Minimal [targets](https://docs.ropensci.org/targets/) pipeline for testing
`crew.cluster::crew_controller_sge()` with Singularity on UCL MYRIAD.

## Purpose

Verify the full HPC workflow before migrating a production pipeline:

1. Build container locally
2. Upload `.sif` to MYRIAD
3. Submit controller job
4. SGE workers launch inside Singularity
5. All targets complete
6. Quarto website renders

## Usage

```r
# Local (default)
targets::tar_make()

# On MYRIAD: edit _targets_config.R to use SGE controller, then
# qsub scripts/run_pipeline_myriad.sh
```
